scripts.build: npm run build:static && npm run test:static
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check scripts/build-static.js && node --check scripts/launch-audit.js && node --check test/smoke.test.js && node --check test/static-build.test.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && CF_PAGES_URL=https://preview.harutool.pages.dev npm run build && npm run audit:launch
